fields.label: Overline
fields.name: oac_overline
fields.instructions: Small label above the heading, e.g. "Industry Partners".

fields.label: Heading
fields.name: oac_heading
fields.instructions: Section heading, e.g. "Our occupational advisory committee".

fields.label: Intro
fields.name: oac_intro
fields.instructions: Optional lead paragraph(s) describing the committee.

fields.label: Member Organizations
fields.name: oac_orgs
fields.instructions: Optional list of committee member organizations, shown as a bulleted list.

fields.label: Logo Tiles
fields.name: oac_logos
fields.instructions: Partner logos, shown as a grid of tiles.

sub_fields.label: Logo
sub_fields.name: oac_logo_image
sub_fields.instructions: Partner logo. Transparent PNG or clean JPG works best.

sub_fields.label: Name
sub_fields.name: oac_logo_name
sub_fields.instructions: Organization name, used as the image alt text.
